name: Tree Wyrm
tips: 5 mana for a 33🗡️/33🤍 body that draws a card on Summon — same chassis as Flame Wyrm. The free react tutor on top is what makes it a chain piece.

In the opponent's Decay Phase (the end-of-turn react window), you may discard Tree Wyrm from hand for 1 mana to tutor up to 2 more Tree Wyrms from your deck. Net: -1 card spent on the react, +2 cards tutored = +1 hand size and your deck thinned of Wyrms.
The react has no body — you trade THIS Tree Wyrm to load your hand with future Tree Wyrms. Plan to hard-cast the ones you tutor.
Plays around board wipes: the react fires in the opponent's Decay Phase — after their automatic Decay effects resolve — so you can hold a Tree Wyrm reactively and refill after they sweep.
Hard-casting a Tree Wyrm with a card draw on Summon snowballs nicely — by mid-game you can have 2-3 Wyrms in hand from a single tutor.
rulings: Normal play: 5 mana to deploy as a 33/33 minion. Triggers Summon: Draw 1 (own deck).

React play: 1 mana, in the end-of-turn react window of the opponent's Decay Phase (after their automatic Decay effects — Burning ticks, Decay triggers — resolve; react_condition=opponent_ends_turn). Tree Wyrm goes to your graveyard from hand and you tutor 2 Tree Wyrms from your deck to hand (picks are mandatory, capped at the number remaining in deck). If your hand is full (10 cards), a tutored Tree Wyrm burns to your Exhaust Pile revealed — the pick still happens.
tutor_target='tree_wyrm' — only Tree Wyrm itself qualifies. If your deck has no Tree Wyrms, the react resolves with 0 picks (no refund of the discarded card).
If your deck has only 1 Tree Wyrm, the picker caps at 1 pick.
Summon: Draw fires once per deploy, not on the react play (the react runs the react_effect only — no Summon triggers, no body deployed).
